name_en: Latest version FEND1 Baguette chain series
name_cn:
Latest version FEND1 Baguette chain series
The Baguette handbag features classic elements that never go out of style, exuding timeless charm. It incorporates the most popular practical accessory in today's market—the sliding chain, meeting daily needs while combining functionality and a modern attitude 😈
397B98
Size 24x14x7cm
